title: Make 20 Year Anniversary image the full background

requirements.summary: Apply the uploaded 20 Year Anniversary image (86b32a34-8ef3-4143-8e81-c566b3678f98.png) as a full background covering the entire hero section in the homepage
acceptanceCriteria: The 20 Year Anniversary image (86b32a34-8ef3-4143-8e81-c566b3678f98.png) displays as the full background of the hero section
The background image covers the entire hero section area
Foreground text and content remain readable over the background image
Background image is properly sized and positioned using CSS background properties

file_operations.description: Modify the hero section to use the uploaded 20 Year Anniversary image (frontend/public/assets/86b32a34-8ef3-4143-8e81-c566b3678f98.png) as a full background. Update the hero container to use CSS background-image with background-size: cover, background-position: center, and background-repeat: no-repeat. Ensure foreground text remains readable by adding appropriate text shadows or overlays if needed. Remove or adjust any existing background styling that conflicts with the full background image approach.
